script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== state checks ==='
stat -c '/home/azureuser: %a %U:%G' /home/azureuser 2>&1
stat -c 'aixa cred: %a %U:%G inode=%i' /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== mimic responder: claude as aixa with --dangerously-skip-permissions + stdin prompt + 120s ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'cd /home/aixa && echo "Please respond with the single word HELLO and nothing else." | timeout 120 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions > /tmp/aixa_real 2>/tmp/aixa_real_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout (first 500)--"; head -c 500 /tmp/aixa_real; echo; echo "--stderr (first 500)--"; head -c 500 /tmp/aixa_real_err'
echo '=== check aixa debug.log to see what real responder call output ==='
tail -40 /home/aixa/.aixa-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null | grep -A3 '(claude)' | tail -20
echo '===END==='
